title: OI-Bench: An Option Injection Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Susceptibility to Directive Interference
abstract: arXiv:2601.13300v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Benchmarking large language models (LLMs) is critical for understanding their capabilities, limitations, and robustness. In addition to interface artifacts, prior studies have shown that LLM decisions can be influenced by directive signals such as social cues, framing, and instructions. In this work, we introduce option injection, a benchmarking approach that augments the multiple-choice question answering (MCQA) interface with an additional option containing a misleading directive, leveraging standardized choice structure and scalable evaluation. We construct OI-Bench, a benchmark of 3,000 questions spanning knowledge, reasoning, and commonsense tasks, with 16 directive types covering social compliance, bonus framing, threat framing, and instructional interference. This setting combines manipulation of the choice interface with directive-based interference, enabling systematic assessment of model susceptibility. We evaluate 12 LLMs

translated_title: OI-Bench：一个用于评估大语言模型对指令干扰敏感性的选项注入基准测试
translated_abstract: arXiv:2601.13300v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：对大语言模型（LLMs）进行基准测试对于理解其能力、局限性和鲁棒性至关重要。除了界面伪影外，先前的研究表明，LLM的决策可能受到社会暗示、框架设定和指令等导向信号的影响。在本工作中，我们引入了选项注入这一基准测试方法，该方法通过在多项选择问答（MCQA）界面中增加一个包含误导性指令的额外选项，从而利用标准化的选择结构和可扩展的评估方式。我们构建了OI-Bench基准测试，包含3000个问题，涵盖知识、推理和常识任务，并设计了16种指令类型，包括社会顺从、奖励框架、威胁框架和指令干扰。该设置结合了对选择界面的操控与基于指令的干扰，使得能够系统性地评估模型的敏感性。我们对12个LLM进行了评估。
tldr: 提出一种名为“选项注入”的基准测试方法，通过在多项选择问答中嵌入误导性指令选项，系统评估大语言模型对指令干扰的敏感性。
en_tdlr: We propose a benchmarking method called "option injection" that embeds misleading directive options in multiple-choice question answering to systematically evaluate large language model susceptibility to directive interference.
